$comment: The one file you edit. Everything else is machine-agnostic.

packages.$comment: Which manifest tags to install. See manifest/packages.json.

$comment: root: where repos live. Override per-run with -ProjectsRoot.
fallbackRoot is used when root's drive doesn't exist on this machine,
so a laptop without a D: drive still works with no config edit.
$comment2: Repo sets, selected with -Repos. A set either lists `repos` explicitly
or names an `owner` with includeAll to resolve via `gh repo list` at
clone time. `path` puts a set in its own subdirectory under root;

signing.$comment: 'ssh' reuses the SSH key for commit signing (simplest). 'gpg' generates a GPG key. 'none' skips.
